title: Maya's Builder Tools
description: A Minecraft building utility mod I made for myself!
body: # Maya's Builder Tools This mod is a collection of builder tools I made! _There is currently only one feature, but many more will come later on_ ## Custom Orientation Picker This allows you to place directional blocks in pre-selected orientation, independently of your rotation. You can open the orientation menu by pressing **Left ALT** while **Holding any directional block** in your hand. You can change the selected orientation by using scroll wheel while the menu is open. **Note:** I'm aware of Chests, Ender chests and bells not rendering correctly in the orientation picker menu. This is issue of owo-lib (The UI Library this mod is using) # Contributing - If you found bug or something doesn't work, please open an issue [here](https://github.com/LukynkaCZE/MayaBuilderTools/issues) - If you want to suggest a feature, please open an issue [here](https://github.com/LukynkaCZE/MayaBuilderTools/issues) - If you are developer and want to contribute, check out the [source code](https://github.com/LukynkaCZE/MayaBuilderTools/). Feel free to open pull requests! # Support If you like the mod, consider supporting me by [buying me a cofee](https://ko-fi.com/lukynkacze)
